reason: The score and justifications are well-supported by external sources. The core claims are all verifiable: the film strips Dean of his soccer passion, artistic identity, and verbal contributions (confirmed by CBR and HP Wiki); his DA participation is reduced to a background role (confirmed); the Ginny relationship arc is present in HBP but stripped of texture - notably the film gives Dean zero lines in HBP and omits the breakup entirely; the DH fugitive arc is absent from the films (Dean doesn't appear at Malfoy Manor or Shell Cottage in the movies at all, only gets a radio mention). One slight overstatement: the scorer says the DH arc 'is present but stripped of dialogue and texture' - in reality the film essentially cuts Dean from DH Part 1 entirely rather than just stripping texture. The forged-signature claim (POA) is accurate per the wiki. The score of 65 is reasonable given that the Ginny subplot and DH arc are the two biggest film appearances and both are heavily cut, while the character is recognizable but very flat. A slightly lower score (55-60) could also be argued given how completely the DH arc was excised from the films.
